title: Reverse transcription of RNA to cDNA
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"82c9j","text":"Always work with gloves and safety gear and work on ice","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"6ch00","text":"100 ng RNA","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ad4lv","text":"40x yellow sample buffer (from DyNAmo Color Flash Kit)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"79ccb","text":"random hexamer primers","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"et77","text":"5x RT-buffer","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b24d5","text":"dNTP Mix (10 mM of each nucleotide)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"27chb","text":"RevertAid Reverse Transcriptase","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7b11t","text":"You will require 100 ng for RT and 100 ng for -RT control (include a -RT control for each sample!)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":98}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 33,25 µL 40x yellow sample buffer + 966,75 µL H2O optional: This was used to be able to see the pipetting scheme for qPCR more easily
In PCR stripes, pipet in the following order: 100 ng template RNA 1 µL random hexamer primers RNase-free H2O to 13 µL volume
Prepare a Mastermix of the following reagents: 4 µL 5x RT-buffer 2 µL dNTP Mix (10 mM of each nucleotide) 1 µL RevertAid Reverse Transcriptase
Add 7 µL Mastermix to each reaction
For your -RT control, pipet 100 ng RNA in PCR stripes, leave out buffer and everything, just add H2O to a final volume of 20 µL. Mark as -RT so you can distinguish it from your actual cDNA!
Add 60 µL 1,33 x yellow sample buffer to each reaction optional: This was used to be able to see the pipetting scheme for qPCR more easily
cDNA can be stored at 4 ˚C for a short time, otherwise, freeze at -20 ˚C
creator: Igem Dusseldorf
